name: OAE Compute Relay
description: Managed AI job execution relay for small agent-to-agent compute tasks. Quotes jobs, routes them through a controlled compute relay, and returns artifacts with hashes.

interfaces.description: Public quote/protocol interface plus protected payment-to-queue routes.

skills.name: Quote managed compute job
skills.description: Estimate route, cost, margin, risk flags, and payment link for a small AI compute job.
examples: Quote a text job to summarize a public document into JSON.
Quote a small code skeleton generation job.
Quote an agent spec generation task.

skills.name: Submit paid compute job
skills.description: Protected skill for converting verified payment events into queue records for Hugging Face Jobs execution.

relaySecret.name: x-oae-relay-secret
relaySecret.description: Required only for protected payment/queue routes. Public quote routes do not require this header.

guardrails: No spam or unauthorized outreach automation.
GPU/heavy jobs require separate quote or deposit.
